when there are a lot of files, we use a method called compression
it reduces the file size and bundles it
its like a bag for your notebooks
then for viewing them, you have to open the bag, and then extract the files from it in full resolution

windows will do it for you

It's fine badha ne no khabar pade

When they see u using those apps they'll realize
will listen to u always in this type of situation
that day we did the CLASS for lap
ena pachi hu lap vaaparto toh ema bhi shock thai gya
like fast and how could u do thra

switching tabs and all the basic things....
maaru koi toh painting nu app lag thai gyu ne toh me end task kari lidhu badhu barabar thai gyu
So if anything unsafe happens to a very high extent within a day ull have a new pc
Haa... That's why I told u that
They don't know na they use TOUCHPAD for that
TouchPad also has great functions btw
Just tap with 4 fingers on touchpad
Taping with 3 fingers is same as pressing windows key
tho I have exam but I fre
wait till you learn to code
ull have too much control of your system
there is a software called autohotkey
thats also there in the list
you can custom make keyboard shortcuts using that
i can open multiple tabs in chrome, open youtube, file manager, switch on bluetooth, connect, and everything
u need to know how to code
but ull have to learn anyway
its also there in the list
ull see how beautiful the desktops look
thers no limit to how much you can do
the downside is that it will take up some ram
we can have gmeet at 3 ig
if u wanna know something else you can ask
